title: Dragon Power applies Hit Atk and AL while equipped

card.rawText: Hit: +5. Atk: +10. Increase AL to 12. The equipped card must do damage during your turn, or this card is destroyed.

plan.title: Dragon Power applies Hit Atk and AL while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Dragon Power to a modifier-zero primary creature, verify AL becomes 12, and run a battle to verify the printed Hit and Atk bonuses.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the Hit and Atk bonuses come only from Dragon Power.
This fixture covers the while-equipped stat package, not the end-of-turn self-destroy clause.

steps: Player 1 plays Dragon Power and equips it to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.
Inspect the resolved hit roll modifier and damage dealt.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +10 Atk bonus

manualVerification: Confirm 118-E02 separately: Dragon Power is destroyed at end of turn if the equipped card did not do damage during your turn.
riskNotes: The source metadata was updated so the printed AL-to-12 clause is represented as an AL SET 12 stat change.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Dragon Power equipped stat suite.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
